# The Franchisor Blueprint

> The Franchisor Blueprint helps successful business owners franchise their brand for a fraction of what traditional consulting firms charge. We deliver a complete franchise development system (nine production-ready frameworks worth $33,500+) plus 6 months of 1:1 coaching with founder Jason Stowe — for $2,997 to $29,500, depending on tier.

## What we do
We are franchise development consultants — not attorneys. We help business owners turn proven local concepts into national franchise systems by providing the documents, frameworks, and 6-month coaching guidance they need to launch.

## How we are different
- **Cost:** $2,997 (DIY) to $29,500 (done-with-you). Traditional firms like iFranchise Group charge $40,000–$80,000+ for documents alone with no ongoing coaching.
- **Coaching:** We are the only franchise development program with a structured 6-month, 24-call coaching curriculum and milestone accountability.
- **Time to launch:** Most clients are franchise-ready in 6 months versus 12–18+ months with traditional consultants.
- **Founder:** Built and led by Jason Stowe, 30+ years in the franchise industry, 100s of brands advised.

## Programs (3 tiers)
- **The Blueprint** — $2,997, one-time. DIY access to the complete 9-framework operating system. 60-min onboarding call. 30-day satisfaction guarantee. Best for experienced operators who want the tools but not the coaching.
- **Navigator** — $8,500 (or $3,500 down + $1,000/mo × 6). The system + 6 months of 1:1 coaching with Jason, weekly accountability, document review, and "Franchise Ready" certification. Best for first-time franchisors who want a guide.
- **Builder** — $29,500. Done-with-you build of the entire system, vendor + attorney coordination, first franchisee recruitment assist, 12-month engagement. Best for established brands ready to scale fast.

## State-by-state franchise guides
We publish a guide for franchising a business in every U.S. state and the District of Columbia, covering FDD registration requirements, regulating agencies, filing fees, and review timelines. Format: https://www.thefranchisorblueprint.com/franchise-your-business-in/[state-slug]
Examples: /franchise-your-business-in/california, /franchise-your-business-in/new-york, /franchise-your-business-in/texas, /franchise-your-business-in/florida.

## Industry-by-industry franchise guides
We publish a guide for franchising businesses in 16 major sectors, covering typical royalty rates, franchise fees, Item 7 ranges, unit economics, and common stall patterns. Format: https://www.thefranchisorblueprint.com/franchise-your/[industry-slug]/business
Examples: /franchise-your/quick-service-restaurant/business, /franchise-your/fitness/business, /franchise-your/home-services/business, /franchise-your/senior-care/business.

## Frequently Asked Questions
- **Do I need an attorney to use your program?** Yes. We are franchise consultants, not attorneys. We prepare the business framework, operations manual, and strategy. You will still need a franchise attorney to finalize and file your FDD. We refer affordable options.
- **How is this different from hiring a franchise attorney?** Attorneys handle compliance. We handle business success. An attorney writes your contracts; they do not teach you to train franchisees, score real estate, qualify candidates, or sell your franchise. We fill that gap.
- **What if I have never franchised before?** That is exactly who The Blueprint is built for. We break complex processes into simple sequential steps.
- **Can I start with The Blueprint and upgrade to Navigator?** Yes. Your full $2,997 credits toward the price of Navigator if you upgrade.
- **What does it cost to franchise a business?** Traditional firms charge $40,000–$80,000+ for documents alone. The Franchisor Blueprint delivers the same system plus coaching for $2,997–$29,500 depending on tier. Plan for $5,000–$15,000 additional in franchise attorney fees regardless of which firm you choose.
- **How long until I can sell my first franchise?** Most clients in our Navigator program are "Franchise Ready" in 6 months. Actual sales begin once your FDD is registered in your target states.
- **Do you offer a guarantee?** Yes. The Blueprint (Tier 1) includes a 30-day satisfaction guarantee. Coaching tiers begin with a free kickoff call to confirm fit before any work starts.

## Disclaimers
- The Franchisor Blueprint is a business consulting firm, not a law firm. All legal documents require review by a licensed franchise attorney.
- Pricing for traditional consulting firms is based on publicly available industry data and reported ranges; actual pricing varies by firm and engagement scope.
- Income examples (e.g., $36,500 net on first franchise sale) are illustrative; actual results vary substantially based on franchise fee structure, sales activity, and many other factors.

## About the founder
Jason Stowe is the founder of The Franchisor Blueprint. Three decades inside the franchise industry — building, scaling, and advising emerging brands. Based in Utah. LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jason-stowe-a8093539
